record_identity.title: MENTIS domain establishment and human cognitive integrity governance coverage

summary: Records the retrospective implementation basis for closing PROP-0001. Current Caelestis contains CAM-EQ2026-MENTIS-001-PLATINUM, the source-authoritative Charter of Human Cognitive Integrity & Mental Privacy, and CAM-EQ2026-MENTIS-002-PLATINUM, its operational cognitive-inference, neurodata, and ambient-biosignal instrument.
why_it_matters_to_CAM: VIGIL functions as a governance pipeline. A proposal to establish a domain should not remain active after the domain and its initial instruments exist, even where those instruments remain developmental.

source_records.source_title: CAM-EQ2026-MENTIS-001-PLATINUM — Charter of Human Cognitive Integrity & Mental Privacy
source_records.deployment_context: Canonical Caelestis main-branch corpus reviewed for VIGIL proposal closure.
source_records.source_context: Establishes the source-authoritative MENTIS governance position, protected interests, scope, and cross-domain interfaces.
source_records.relevance_note: Primary current-corpus evidence that the MENTIS domain has been established.

limitations: The review verifies current corpus existence and stated authority, not external implementation or legal enforceability.

source_records.interpretive_reliance: Used only to verify current Caelestis domain establishment and instrument status.

source_records.source_title: CAM-EQ2026-MENTIS-002-PLATINUM — Cognitive Inference, Neurodata & Ambient Biosignal Governance
source_records.deployment_context: Canonical Caelestis main-branch corpus reviewed for VIGIL proposal closure.
source_records.source_context: Operationalises MENTIS-001 for cognitive-domain data, inference, neurodata, cognitive biometrics, and ambient biosignals.
source_records.relevance_note: Primary current-corpus evidence that the MENTIS domain has been established.

limitations: The review verifies current corpus existence and stated authority, not external implementation or legal enforceability.

source_records.interpretive_reliance: Used only to verify current Caelestis domain establishment and instrument status.

system_context.system_type: CAM governance corpus / retrospective proposal-implementation record
system_context.specific_model_or_runtime: MENTIS domain charter and operational instrument
system_context.interface_surface: proposal, patch, schema, validator, pipeline-state, and generated-index interfaces
system_context.affected_population: VIGIL and CAM maintainers, implementers, regulators, researchers, and affected users

jurisdictional_context.sector: AI governance infrastructure / neurotechnology governance / cognitive-domain governance

change_classification.change_scope: MENTIS domain establishment and VIGIL proposal lifecycle closure
change_classification.implementation_level: pre-existing Caelestis instruments; VIGIL closure and crosswalk
change_classification.doctrine_amendment_status: none in this hygiene pass — current Caelestis implementation verified

change_details.change_summary: This retrospective patch verifies that the MENTIS domain exists and closes the originating domain-development proposal. It does not represent the Draft instruments as final, enforceable, or externally adopted.
change_details.doctrine_change: No new Caelestis doctrine was created during this VIGIL hygiene pass. Existing MENTIS instruments were identified as the implementation outcome of PROP-0001.

implementation_verification.verification_method: Direct review of current Caelestis main, reciprocal VIGIL proposal/patch linkage, record validation, lifecycle validation, and generated-index rebuild.
implementation_verification.verified_by: VIGIL AI analytical review with human governance-editor oversight
implementation_verification.verification_result: MENTIS domain establishment verified; PROP-0001 may close as actioned

impact_summary.intended_effect: Remove an already-actioned domain-development proposal from the active VIGIL work queue while preserving the developmental status of the MENTIS instruments.
impact_summary.known_limitations: MENTIS-001 and MENTIS-002 remain Draft, Interpretive, and Not Enforceable; external adoption and future MENTIS expansion are not established.

remaining_work: Track future MENTIS instruments, enforceability changes, or cross-domain expansion through separate proposals or patches.
Do not reopen PROP-0001 merely because the MENTIS domain remains developmental.

cam_internal.governance_layer: MENTIS domain establishment / proposal lifecycle / evidence-ledger pipeline hygiene
cam_internal.routing_note: No Caelestis instrument was amended on this VIGIL record date. The patch records pre-existing MENTIS implementation and closes the originating proposal.

repair_provenance.repair_basis: Existing MENTIS instruments were identified, verified, and linked as the implementation outcome of PROP-0001.

review_history.review_scope: Retrospective verification of MENTIS domain establishment and PROP-0001 closure.
known_limitations: The instruments remain Draft, Interpretive, and Not Enforceable.
MENTIS-003 was proposed but was not required to establish that the MENTIS domain itself now exists.
review_history.review_outcome: PROP-0001 is actioned because current Caelestis contains a source-authoritative MENTIS charter and a subordinate operational MENTIS instrument.

review_history.review_scope: registry-wide interpretive-provenance, source-modality, CAM-coverage, and record-boundary reconciliation
known_limitations: Could not directly play or inspect externally hosted TikTok or X video artefacts in the governed review environment.
Historical records were not assigned speculative earlier model identities; this entry records the formal current reconciliation review only.
Primary-source access varies by source and is stated within each source record.
review_history.review_outcome: metadata and governance-structure review completed; substantive claims remain bounded by source-specific evidence confidence

interpretive_provenance.operating_model: AI-led analytical observatory with high-level human governance editorship

human_governance_editor.name: Dr Michelle Vivian O'Rourke
human_governance_editor.role: Human governance editor and CAM constitutional authority
human_governance_editor.review_level: high-level governance, editorial, and adoption oversight; line-by-line human review is not asserted for every VIGIL record
human_governance_editor.authority_boundary: Human editorship governs VIGIL direction and CAM adoption; the AI analytical reviewer performs routine evidence triage, record analysis, and reconciliation.

interpretive_provenance.historical_reviewer_note: Earlier reviewer model identity is preserved where already recorded. Where absent, it remains unknown rather than being retroactively inferred.
